title: Technical Superintendent
description: Oversee the technical maintenance and regulatory compliance of assigned vessels.
overview: We are looking for an experienced Technical Superintendent to manage a fleet of tankers/bulk carriers. You will ensure vessels are maintained to the highest standards and comply with all classification and flag state regulations.
responsibilities: Monitor vessel performance and planned maintenance systems.
Prepare and oversee dry dockings and repairs.
Conduct vessel inspections and internal audits.
Manage technical budgets and spare parts procurement.
Ensure compliance with ISM, ISPS, and MLC regulations.
requirements: 2+ years of shore-based experience as Superintendent.
Experience with Tankers or Bulk Carriers preferred.
Strong knowledge of international maritime regulations.
Willingness to travel for vessel inspections.

title: Crewing Executive
description: Handle end-to-end recruitment and mobilization of seafarers.
overview: Join our Crewing department to manage the recruitment, planning, and mobilization of seafarers. You will ensure our vessels are manned by qualified and competent crew members.
responsibilities: Verify certificates and documentation (STCW, Flag State).
Arrange crew travel, visas, and medicals.
Maintain crew records in the management software.
Liaise with manning agents and vessel masters.
requirements: Knowledge of DG Shipping rules and visa procedures.
